scope_summary.problem: SDD phases 2-3, 7 duplicate structured issue content — 6 extra mainthread round-trips
scope_summary.success: Structured issues skip directly to Tech Design phase. init_change auto-generates artifacts. Unstructured issues still work.

boundary.in_scope: init_change parser, issue section format, score issues enrich CLI, SKILL.md skip logic
boundary.out_of_scope: Tech Design CRR changes, Codebase CRR changes, Merge changes, new state machine states
boundary.constraints: Backward compat required — unstructured issues fall back to current flow
